/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -std=c++14 -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/NonRigidreg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/Registration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/tools/nodeSampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/tools/robot_path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spare.dir/src/tools/tools.cpp.o -o spare  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenMeshTools.so.9.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenMeshCore.so.9.0
